hooks.command: $raw=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd();$json=$raw|ConvertFrom-Json;$fp=$json.tool_input.file_path;if($fp -and ($fp -match '(?i)[\\/](Library|Temp|Obj|Logs|UserSettings)[\\/]' -or $fp -match '(?i)^(Library|Temp|Obj|Logs|UserSettings)[\\/]')){$out=[PSCustomObject]@{systemMessage='GUARDRAIL: Unity-generated folder edit is forbidden by project guardrails. Path: '+$fp};$out|ConvertTo-Json -Compress}
